tasks.instruction: For a 3-night midsummer stay for 2 adults and 2 children, search chalets with free breakfast and a kitchenette that cost under $220 per night and start booking the highest-rated option.

tasks.instruction: For a one-day conference in early September with about 50 attendees, find rooms that can host this group and include both a projector and sound system, then begin a full-day reservation for the cheapest suitable option.

tasks.instruction: For a 2-night autumn weekend retreat, select 3 separate lake-view chalets each set up for 2 adults, prioritizing options rated at least 4.5 stars and keeping the combined total price at or below $1,800, then proceed toward checkout in a single booking.

tasks.instruction: For a romantic 2-night weekend stay for 2 adults, compare available romantic packages that include late checkout and start booking the package that offers the latest checkout time on departure.

tasks.instruction: For a 3-night midweek chalet stay in November for 1 adult, find the cheapest available option and begin booking it, applying the 'WINTER20' promo code before moving on to the payment step.

tasks.instruction: For a full-day conference for 40 attendees, choose as your main hall the event space that can host at least 40 people at the lowest full-day rate, add two different breakout rooms that each support at least 20 people while keeping room costs low, and include a vegetarian buffet lunch for all attendees before proceeding to attendee details.

tasks.instruction: After switching the site currency to euros, search for a one-night stay for 2 adults and start booking a chalet with a private hot tub that is priced under €180 per night.
